fileTabs.content: select  *  from ( select a.customer_number, a.addressline1, a.addressline2, a.addressline3, a.addressline4, a.addressline5, a.addressline6, a.postcode, a.country, rank() over (partition by customer_number order by last_action_date desc) r  from work_cards_orig_staging  a  where customer_number is not null)  where r=1
